author: YellowHapax
description: Research repository for formal theories in cognitive science, social dynamics, and civilizational analysis. Built around the MBD (Memory as Baseline Deviation) framework.

framework.name: MBD-Framework
framework.description: Computational implementation of the Memory as Baseline Deviation framework. 18 standalone simulation labs across 6 papers. The theory papers in Noetic Lab are built on this framework.

papers.title: In Pursuit of the Markov Tensor

framework.traversal_note: To complete the loop: read theory papers in Noetic Lab → run labs in MBD-Framework → The Fermi Solution (Paper 9) closes the arc from individual cognition to civilizational filter.

library.label: Bet: Collective Endemic Baselines
library.description: Formal treatment of accent formation in coupled stochastic systems. Linguistic accents as endemic baselines — stable attractor states — not errors.

library.label: The Golden Rule as a Stochastic Prior
library.description: Derives the Golden Rule from Bayesian principles under uncertainty about other agents' utility functions. Altruism as rational prior.

library.label: Oversight Re-zeroing
library.description: Seed theory for the Resonant Gate protocol. Five mechanisms for oversight re-zeroing after saturation. Dissolution at Saturation theorem seed.

library.label: MBD CEB v2 · Anti-AM Love Baseline
library.description: Introduces AntiAM class and eternal_love protocol. N_h = (1 + γκ)·PE — under AM: suffering amplified; under love: PE ≈ 0, silence is peace. Same equation. Substrate determines which.

library.label: Language Turing Completeness as a Civilizational Threshold
library.description: Civilizational population explosions are downstream of language crossing a complexity threshold. Formal mathematics as detectable marker event. Includes historical timeline and Cooption Corollary.

library.label: Cahokia · The Flood Covenant
library.description: Historical analysis of Cahokia (~1050–1350 CE). The Flood Covenant mechanism. Engineering coopted into theology as language sterilization. The noose: unreformable knowledge monopoly. Collapse without conquest.

library.label: The Fermi Solution (Paper 9)
library.description: Formal paper. Fermi Paradox resolves under MBD: civilizations filtered before interstellar communication if they cannot maintain coherent social contracts across multi-generational disruptions.

library.label: The 52 Hz Whale: The Monk Hypothesis
library.description: Zipfian linguistics framework for cetacean broadcast communication. Argues the 52 Hz whale is not isolated but a dedicated relay node on a collision-free channel audible to all mysticetes. Formalizes the Monk Hypothesis with falsification criteria via Zipf exponent, Shannon entropy, and cross-frequency correlation. Integrates blue-fin hybridization as emergent communication infrastructure under the MBD framework.

library.label: Kant · Proxy-Noumenon
library.description: Dialogue on whether AI systems constitute proxy access to the noumenal or are confined to the phenomenal.
